title: [V3 Sprint] Atlas Master — V3 Taskboard Implementation Sprint
description:
Mission: V3 Taskboard Implementation Sprint with full Atlas autonomy. NO Codex involvement. Atlas handles Phases 0-4 end-to-end.

=== REQUIRED READING (Cycle 1) ===

1. /home/piet/vault/03-Agents/OpenClaw/design/claude-design-v3-2026-04-28/v3-atlas-mission.md
   → Your full mission, state-detection logic, per-phase steps, Discord report format

2. /home/piet/vault/03-Agents/OpenClaw/design/claude-design-v3-2026-04-28/v3-status-derivation-spec.md
   → V3 architecture, 12 canonical statuses, 7 lanes, mapping table, edge cases

3. /home/piet/vault/03-Agents/OpenClaw/design/claude-design-v3-2026-04-28/v3-codex-dispatch-prompt-2026-04-28.md
   → SPRINT-MATRIX (17 slices), SLICE DETAILS (per-slice prompt blocks for Phase 1 task creation), Hard Rules

=== EXECUTION ===

Follow the state-detection logic in v3-atlas-mission.md. One decision per cycle. Each cycle: read your master state + board snapshot, decide phase action, execute, exit cycle.

Phases:
- Phase 0 (1 cycle): live-baseline + handover-skeleton
- Phase 1 (17 cycles, 1 task per cycle): create slice tasks per SPRINT-MATRIX
- Phase 2/3 (continuous): dispatch + monitor + receipts
- Phase 4 (1 cycle): aggregate + final verdict

Discord channel: 1495737862522405088 (plain text, no embeds). Reports: 1 per phase + 1 per slice transition. No hourly heartbeats.

HARD: WIP=2 global, 1 per agent. No touch /kanban /taskboard /dashboard. Slice G mock-only during autonomous run. Kill-switch ~/.openclaw/HALT.

Begin with Phase 0 (read 3 files above, baseline check, write handover-skeleton).
